title: Payment service degradation cascades to order service
description: Payment service experiences latency issues, causing order service to timeout on payment calls, and API gateway to return 503 errors.

logs.message: Query execution time exceeded 2000ms for transaction lookups
Thread pool utilization at 87%: processing payment requests slower than intake
Timeout calling payment-service: requests taking >5000ms to complete
Retry attempts exhausted after 3 failed payment validations
POST /orders returned 503: order-service unavailable after payment timeouts
Cache eviction policy triggered due to increased key churn

alerts.message: Payment service p99 latency exceeds SLO by 2.4x for 8 minutes
Order service error rate above 20% due to downstream timeouts
Redis memory usage approaching eviction threshold

ground_truth.correct_fix: ANALYZE query execution plans and add index on transaction_id; kubectl rollout restart deploy/payment-service
